stemHtml: What type of loads are in the spar of a cantilever wing during straight and level flight?

options.a: The upper surface is in compression while the lower surface is in tension.
options.b: The upper surface is in tension while the lower surface is in torsion.
options.c: The upper surface is in tension while the lower surface is in compression.
options.d: The upper surface is in torsion while the lower surface is in tension.
